summary: Add Telegram /signal command spec for all TW and US holdings, showing long-term add-on signal status and 90-day history without amount advice.
assumptions: /signal v1 shows all holdings only and does not support tw/us/symbol filters.
No amount, share count, cash, monthly budget, overweight, or ranking output is included.
Scheduled push behavior remains unchanged and only shows existing per-stock add-on signal when triggered.
90-day history uses existing signal_history_repo.list_signals() and Redis signal:history:* records.
Observation status means price is below MA50 or drawdown is between -15% and -20%.
